name: create_pie_chart
description: Creates and displays a pie chart visualization for financial data. Use when user asks to visualize data as a pie chart or wants to see proportional breakdowns.

parameters.description: Parameters for creating a pie chart

data.description: JSON string array of data points for the pie chart. Each item should have 'name' and 'value' properties. Values should be in USD. Example: [{"name":"Groceries","value":500},{"name":"Rent","value":1200}] represents $500 and $1,200 respectively.
